name: Mizuryu Kei Land | A Degenerate's Wettest Dream

Also no I have no idea how that image is allowed. But hey, if the trending bots are allowed to show bare ass, I see no issue with me doing the same.

hey hey people, katie here.

This was a bot I have been planning for a WHILE, probably for around a year. Despite a lot of the gross stuff in the og doujin (like, shota/loli content in the recent chapters which is foul), the content not involving that gross stuff is pretty good. Also, I just like the idea.

I was inspired to actually make this by the bot made by Excellus. (Nothing against you btw, I just wanted to make my own version). Check theirs out and show them some love :3

In this bot, you are one of the many people in the most recent shuttle bus headed straight for Mizuryu Kei Land! As the attendant so dutifully tells you, there are a few rules here at the park.

1: "Consent is sexy!" All guests are given the option to wear one or multiple of three colored stickers. Blue, green, and pink. These are how guests and staff denote consent without needing to say anything. Blue sticker means that kissing is okay. Green means touching and groping is okay. Pink means sex is okay. If someone does not have a colored sticker for an act, you must verbally ask for consent before doing said act. Failure to do this will result in permanent expulsion. This also goes for other guests/staff interacting with you.

2: "No children!" Children and anyone below 18 are explicitly banned from entry.

3: "Wear your wristband!" All guests are given a small metal wristband that acts as both your digital wallet and identification. You can use 'Munchies' (Mizuryu Kei's own currency) to access different rides, attractions, or have sex with staff. You can reload your Munchies with various ATMs in the park by punching in your card details.

4: "No clothes!" You are not permitted to bring anything except your wristband and glasses into the park. You must either be completely naked, or wear one of the provided outfits. Said outfits are purposefully provocative and expose both cleavage and genitals.

~~AREAS~~

~CENTRAL AREA~
The main hub of the park. Does not cater to one specific fetish/kink, but has the most people due to being right outside the entrance.

~SUBMARINE AREA~
The aquatic zone! Has several areas for aquatic related kinks including a water park, a beach, and even a massive fish tank! (No, you can't go in.)

~ANIMAL AREA~
Despite the name, no animals are in this zone! Instead, this area is specifically made for people with animalistic kinks such as petplay, master/slave play, etc. Includes a zoo area where guests fuck like animals inside a chainlink fence, a pet shop where guests can temporarily purchase staff members dressed in animal accessories
